When I try to use the assert_image_XXX on a tiff file with multiple dimensions (multiple slices and/or multiple channels) the assert_image gives erroneous results.

**Galaxy Version and/or server at which you observed the bug**
Galaxy Version: 24.2

**Browser and Operating System**
Operating System: Linux

**To Reproduce**
In a tool wrapper that output a tiff image with multiple dimensions like https://github.com/lldelisle/galaxytools/blob/add_roi_export/tools/image_processing/imagej2/imagej2_crop.xml try to use has_image_channels, has_image_height...

The result is incoherent.

I identified the issue. In the galaxy code:

https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/blob/9da413cf7b98d090630f4dcd89bfd23298a468ac/lib/galaxy/tool_util/verify/asserts/image.py#L329

When reading the tiff file content with tifffile, the current code expect the shape to be (X, Y, C).
However, when I try with my tiff images, I get (Z, Y, X) if there is a single channel and (Z, C, Y, X) if there are multiple Z and multiple C.

If you have the file name you can get the 'label' of the shape with:
```python
import tifffile
tif = tifffile.TiffFile('tools/image_processing/imagej2/test-data/confocal-series-both-channels.tiff')
tif.series[0].axes
```
And you will get: `'ZCYX'`
However, I don't know how to get this info when you only get the output_stream.
Also I do not know how to get this info when you have time frames...","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/18851/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/18851/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/comments/2360701686","html_url":"https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/18851#issuecomment-2360701686","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/18851","id":2360701686,"node_id":"IC_kwDOAdw-Nc6MtXL2","user":{"login":"AaryanMadal","id":114259107,"node_id":"U_kgDOBs90ow","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/114259107?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/AaryanMadal","html_url":"https://github.com/AaryanMadal","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/AaryanMadal/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/AaryanMadal/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/AaryanMadal/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/AaryanMadal/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/AaryanMadal/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/AaryanMadal/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/AaryanMadal/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/AaryanMadal/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/AaryanMadal/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-09-19T11:15:31Z","updated_at":"2024-09-19T11:15:31Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"This might help:This file might fix it
